heading: Why trust this LA nighttime safety guide
intro: This guide comes from real experience navigating Los Angeles at night — which venues have good lighting, where rideshare pickup is safest, and what the actual risks are after dark.

items.title: Area-specific night safety assessments
items.text: Nighttime safety varies dramatically block by block in LA. This guide covers specific areas — not just vague 'be careful' advice — so you know exactly where you stand.

items.title: Rideshare and transport safety covered
items.text: Most LA safety advice ignores the car and rideshare dimension. This guide covers parking structure awareness, car break-in prevention, and rideshare safety — the real nighttime risks.

items.title: Solo traveler perspective
items.text: Advice calibrated for people navigating LA alone at night — not groups. The dynamics are different and this guide addresses them directly.

items.title: No fear-based advice
items.text: LA is not dangerous for tourists at night in the main areas. This guide gives you the confidence to enjoy the city after dark while being aware of specific situations to avoid.

footer: If you want clear, honest guidance on staying safe in Los Angeles at night, this guide covers what actually matters.
